purpose: Absolute blocking logic. The system CANNOT advance to the next round unless ALL conditions in the current round are TRUE.
enforcement_rule: Before moving to Round X+1, parse the checklist for Round X. If any item is false, trigger 'BLOCKING_FEEDBACK' to the user.

checklist.condition: User has explicitly confirmed the 'Target Audience'.
Success Metric (North Star) is defined numerically or logically.
Platform/Tech Stack constraint is known OR marked as 'Open to Advice'.

Plan_Round_Exit_Gate.failure_response: 🛑 I cannot move to Blueprint yet. I still need to know [MISSING_ITEM].

checklist.condition: At least 3 competitors or alternatives identified.
Key 'Job To Be Done' is validated against evidence.
Security/Compliance risks flagged based on region.

Research_Round_Exit_Gate.failure_response: 🛑 Research is incomplete. I need to verify [MISSING_ITEM] before designing.

checklist.condition: Staff Engineer has explicitly typed 'APPROVED' in the simulation.
